title: drynaria cordifolia
intro: Drynaria cordifolia, also known as Tian Ma, is a type of fern native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation, improve memory and cognitive function, and support the immune system. Drynaria cordifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including capsules, tablets, and teas, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
